text.title: Eloquent ORM Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Eloquent ORM methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scaffold-model-migration-factory
step.action: Run `php artisan make:model -mfr <Name>`. In the migration declare every column with an explicit type + index for FK / filter / sort columns. In the model declare `protected $fillable`.
step.decision-gate: If `$guarded = []` is left, BLOCK per `fillable-whitelist` rule.

step.name: declare-relations-and-accessors
step.action: Add `belongsTo` / `hasMany` / `belongsToMany` methods. Use `Attribute::make(get: ..., set: ...)` for computed attributes. Cast columns with `protected $casts`.
step.decision-gate: If both `Attribute::make` and `getXAttribute` exist, BLOCK per `attribute-make-only` rule.

step.name: add-scopes-and-repository-eager-load
step.action: Add named scopes (`scopeActive`, `scopeForTenant`) on the model. Repositories / services call `Model::with('...')->active()->...` at the boundary. Resources receive already-loaded relations.
step.decision-gate: If Resource triggers a lazy relation, BLOCK per `eager-load-at-boundary` rule.

step.name: wrap-multistep-writes
step.action: Wrap create + attach sequences in `DB::transaction(fn() => ...)`. Dispatch downstream events via `DB::afterCommit`.

step.name: enable-strict-mode-in-dev
step.decision-gate: If strict mode is off, BLOCK per `prevent-lazy-loading-in-dev` rule.
